name: Hau Toei Chao Fan B1
recipeIngredient: 1/4 cup Peanut or other salad oil
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat 2 tablespoons oil in a wok or large skillet over high heat until very hot.
2. Add eggs and stir-fry for 1/2 minute until firm (same consistency as scrambled eggs). Remove the eggs, cut into small pieces, and set aside.
3. Heat the remaining oil over high heat; lightly brown onion.
4. Add peas and carrots and salt; stir-fry for 1 minute.
5. Add cold rice and stir constantly for 2 minutes.
6. Add soy sauce, ham, scallions, and egg; mix well and serve hot.
Temperature (s): HOT
Effort: AVERAGE
Time: 00:20
